about.label: ABOUT ME
about.text:
I’m a self‑taught Full‑Stack & Mobile Developer. I build modern web applications and mobile experiences that are fast, accessible, and meticulously crafted. My expertise spans React, Next.js, Node.js, React Native, and cloud infrastructure.

Currently focused on building products that ship — clean architecture, great UX, no fluff.

Code is craft. Performance is design.

fullstack.title:
FULL‑STACK
DEVELOPMENT
fullstack.desc: Building responsive and performant web applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, and databases. From landing pages to full SaaS products.

mobile.title:
MOBILE
DEVELOPMENT
mobile.desc: Creating smooth, native‑feeling mobile experiences for iOS and Android from a single codebase. UI polish, animations, and offline support.

uiux.title:
UI / UX
DESIGN
uiux.desc: Creating clean, intentional interfaces that balance aesthetics with usability. Component libraries and accessibility‑first thinking.

backend.title:
API &
BACKEND
backend.desc: Architecting APIs, database schemas, authentication flows, and real‑time features. Node.js, Laravel, PostgreSQL, Firebase, and cloud deployments.
